content: Guest {{userName}} will be removed from all rooms you have invited them to. This action cannot be undone.

comment.text: This translation key is used for a confirmation message that explains why a guest is being removed from invited rooms. It appears in a modal dialog and provides context to the user about the action they are about to take. The translator should provide a message that accurately conveys this information, ensuring consistency across different languages and regions.

usage.context:
</ModalDialog.Header>
 <ModalDialog.Body>
 <Text>
 {!isMulti ? (
 <Trans
 i18nKey="RemoveGuestDescription"
 ns="PeopleTranslations"
 t={t}
 values={{ userName: guests[0]?.displayName }}
 />
 ) : (

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The sentence structure in Azerbaijani is grammatically incorrect and creates a logical error. It translates to 'Guest [Name] they will be removed...', which is redundant and nonsensical in Azerbaijani. The subject 'Qonaq' (Guest) is disconnected from the verb.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Qonaq {{userName}} dəvət etdiyiniz bütün otaqlardan silinəcək. Bu əməliyyat geri qaytarıla bilməz.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Korean translation incorrectly states that the guest is the one who invited the rooms ('게스트가 초대한 모든 룸'), whereas the English text states the guest is being removed from rooms that the USER invited them to.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: {{userName}} 게스트가 귀하가 초대한 모든 룸에서 제거됩니다. 이 작업은 취소할 수 없습니다.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Polish translation incorrectly implies the guest was invited by the user ('został przez Ciebie zaproszony'), whereas the English text says the guest will be removed from rooms 'you have invited them to' (referring to the rooms, not the guest's status). More importantly, the Polish grammar 'został... zaproszony' (singular masculine) is used, which may not match the gender of the guest, but the primary error is the logical shift in the sentence structure regarding who was invited to what.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Gość {{userName}} zostanie usunięty ze wszystkich pokoi, do których go zaprosiłeś. Nie można cofnąć tej czynności.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The English text refers to a single guest ('Guest {{userName}} will be removed'), but the Portuguese translation uses the plural ('Os hóspedes... serão removidos'), which changes the meaning of the specific action being described.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: O convidado {{userName}} será removido de todas as salas para as quais você o convidou. Esta ação não pode ser desfeita.
